This is process-only acceptance; no R1 product implementation is authorized until the task graph is merged to origin/main and RR1-TASK-GRAPH-001 is closed.

decisions.decision: Accept systems and QA reviewed task graph for final Lead gates and PR integration.
Do not dispatch RR1-WEB-WORKER-RUNTIME-001 or any R1 implementation task until the accepted graph enters origin/main and the parent task is closed.
Remove systems_architect and qa_reviewer from active route/thread state after terminal handoffs; keep only Lead active for integration.

risks.summary: Because taskctl treats ACCEPTED as dependency-satisfying, local ready output may show RR1-WEB-WORKER-RUNTIME-001 before merge; Lead must not route it until graph closure on origin/main.
Normal Web/Electron product paths still lack authoritative Worker runtime wiring; this remains child implementation scope.

requested_action: Run final Lead integration gates, push the accepted RR1 task graph PR, wait for CI, merge it into origin/main, and only then close RR1-TASK-GRAPH-001 before dispatching RR1-WEB-WORKER-RUNTIME-001. No R1 product implementation is authorized yet.
